justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions throughout the conversation, including specific times and date ranges.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked for new times, rather than proactively suggesting alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple API calls for each turn where the user provided multiple date/time options, which could be slightly more efficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The experience was somewhat tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, leading to several turns of the user proposing new slots.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well throughout the conversation, remembering the topic and contact medium even when the user proposed multiple new dates and times.
